description_long: This is a single athletic shoe, predominantly dark gray with a white Nike Swoosh logo on the side and a white midsole. The upper is constructed from a mesh-like synthetic material, providing breathability and flexibility, while the sole appears to be made of durable rubber with a patterned tread for traction. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with visible eyelets and a padded tongue for comfort. The heel and toe areas are reinforced, suggesting durability for urban activities such as running or walking. The overall silhouette is sleek and low-profile, typical of modern sports footwear. The shoe shows minimal signs of wear, maintaining a clean and intact appearance.
description: A dark gray athletic shoe with a white Nike Swoosh, mesh upper, and white rubber sole, featuring standard laces and a sleek, low-profile design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Nike Swoosh logo, mesh texture, and the full length of the white midsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel structure, back tab, and the width of the sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with another Swoosh logo and clear visibility of the mesh upper and sole.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the toe box, lacing system, and the padded tongue.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides of the shoe
